name: ihudak-plugins
description: Ivan Gudak's private Claude Code plugin marketplace — productivity and workflow tools

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Three slash commands (/impl, /vuln, /upgrade) with Opus-backed planning, code review, and security-remediation workflows. Includes five reusable subagents (risk-planner, code-review, test-baseline, review-fixer, impl-maintenance) and three notification hooks.

plugins.name: engineering-practices
plugins.description: Five engineering-practice skills: TDD red-green-refactor, architecture deepening, disciplined debugging, and design-grilling sessions (with and without domain docs).

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Two productivity skills: caveman ultra-compressed communication mode (~75% token reduction), and write-a-skill for authoring new Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Two pre-implementation planning skills: discovery-interview turns vague ideas into detailed specs, premortem identifies failure modes using the Tiger/Paper Tiger/Elephant risk framework.

plugins.name: obsidian-llm-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki pattern for an active Obsidian vault. Seven slash commands (/wiki-ingest, /wiki-scan, /wiki-query, /wiki-save, /wiki-lint, /wiki-hot, /wiki-tags-refresh) compile knowledge from meetings, projects, daily notes, and raw sources into a persistent, cross-referenced wiki at Knowledge/wiki/. Supports Claude Code and GitHub Copilot as first-class agents with session-continuity hooks.
